title: Religion Additions and Demonic Integration — Amendments to File 04
note: This file contains additions to the religion system established in 04_religions.json. The Arnethi Covenant and Order of the Compassionate Wound are new faith entries. The existing faiths receive demonic-integration amendments.

new_faith_family.origin: Distinct from Furrow faiths — the Furrow faiths see the earth as divine cycle. Land faiths see Arneth itself as sacred space under assault.
new_faith_family.character: Immediate, practical, community-organized. No institutional hierarchy above regional level. Theologically optimistic in premise (we are in the right place) and urgently mobilized in practice (it is under attack).

faiths.name: The Arnethi Covenant
faiths.organization: Decentralized. Groundkeepers as lay clergy. No authority above regional level.
faiths.political_alignment: None — and this is a vulnerability. Have been periodically suppressed by powers that find the theology threatening.
practices: Land tending as devotional practice — caring for the earth is prayer
Community organization against demonic sites — the most immediate practical mobilization of any faith
Grief rites of unusual intensity — no afterlife comfort, only honest acknowledgment of loss
The Naming — a ritual acknowledgment of each person's specific presence in the world, performed at birth and repeated annually
faiths.attitude_to_outsiders: Welcoming to those who respect the land. Specifically hostile to those who desecrate it for profit.
faiths.wealth: None institutionally — Groundkeepers own nothing beyond their tools
faiths.notes: Overlap with Moor Communion in the Free Fens makes mixed practice common. More Pale Company Wardens came from Soilborn backgrounds than any other faith.
faiths.on_demons: The assault of Hell on Heaven. Personal. Immediate. The whole community is the militant wing.
faiths.on_the_angel_absence: Heaven does not send defenders. Heaven is defended by the people who live in it.

new_minor_faith.note: A single-faith family — the Order of the Compassionate Wound does not have institutional kin. It stands alone.

faiths.name: The Order of the Compassionate Wound
faiths.organization: Chapter-based. Each chapter operates semi-independently under shared practice guidelines. No central authority — the founding institution in the Warden States no longer commands the chapters that have spread outward.
faiths.political_alignment: Officially none. In practice, the Order's care for the dying and damaged makes it a community resource that political powers want to influence.
practices: Hospice care — the dying are not left alone
Feeding the destitute — no conditions, no faith requirement
Recovery practice for demonic influence victims — the Order's most significant and least advertised capability
The Open Hand rite — a specific care gesture derived from Meven's methods, performed at the beginning of any care relationship
faiths.attitude_to_outsiders: Welcoming to anyone who suffers. No faith requirement for care.
faiths.wealth: Variable by chapter — some well-funded by donations, some barely surviving
faiths.the_secret: Meven, the Order's founding saint, was a Daemon. The Order has known for 400 years. The evidence has been suppressed three times. The current internal division about disclosure is the most significant internal crisis the Order has faced.
faiths.on_demons: Practical. The Order deals with the aftermath of demonic influence more than any other institution. Their recovery practices are the most reliable available. The source of those practices is the secret.
faiths.on_daemons: The Order's internal division is partly about this: if Meven was a Daemon who chose forty years of genuine good, what does that mean about Daemon nature? The faction that wants disclosure believes the answer to this question matters more than institutional comfort.
faiths.burial_site_of_meven: The Order guards it. Second strongest anomalous resistance on Arneth. Location within Warden States territory creates ongoing political tension.

thornsveld_marches.current_relevance: The containment Aldren placed in the eastern ridgeline is degrading. The disc Aldren Saltmeadow found is a containment marker. Brother Soren has it and does not yet know what it is. Soven knows.
thornsveld_marches.player_thread: Assembling the full picture — the disc, the second object, Soren's research, Soven's knowledge, Osric Deld's mine testimony — reveals the eastern ridgeline site and what is happening there.

keth_plateau.current_relevance: Varath's text on Daemon involvement in the Varathi Collapse is in the Archive of Keth. The salvage crew's discovery in the deep plateau connects to what Varath documented. The Varathi Return cult wants the text.
keth_plateau.player_thread: Accessing the Archive, finding the text, and connecting the recent discovery to Varath's documentation — a thread that runs from Keth to the Shattered Reach ship to the Encircling Pact.

free_fens.saint: Saint Gorra of the Still Water
free_fens.current_relevance: The northwest fen contamination is Gorra's sealed site degrading. The 84-year-old Station-Keeper who is mapping the contamination has a suspicion she has not voiced. She knows more than she has said.
free_fens.player_thread: Finding the old Station-Keeper, hearing her suspicion, locating Gorra's burial site — and deciding what to do about a sealed demonic site that has been sealed for 600 years and is now unsealing.

shattered_reach.current_relevance: The ship from Ossrath in the outer harbor carries something connected to the Keth discovery. The Salt Silence is interested. Halvard's documented identification method — pay attention to what people do rather than what they say — is the practical key to understanding what the ship's crew is concealing.
shattered_reach.player_thread: Applying Halvard's method to the harbor situation reveals what the standard investigation cannot.

the_ridgeline_site.description: A contained demonic site in the eastern ridgeline above the Durnwald Mine area. Contained by Saint Aldren approximately Year 12,600. The containment is degrading.
current_signs: The specific section of the mine that collapsed was the section furthest from Aldren's burial site and furthest from the containment markers
Mine workers in the collapsed section reported unusual dreams in the weeks before the collapse — consistent with proximity to an active demonic site
Animals have been avoiding the eastern ridgeline in an expanding radius for approximately eighteen months
Torven Greywood the shepherd has seen things at night on the ridgeline that he has not told anyone about yet
the_ridgeline_site.the_disc_truth: The disc Aldren Saltmeadow found is a containment marker — one of several Aldren placed at the boundary of the sealed site. The gemstone-woven steel is the binding substance Aldren's documented methods describe. The second object still under the stone in the east field has markings that are part of the containment boundary inscription.
the_ridgeline_site.what_happens_if_ignored: The site becomes fully active within one to three game years, producing fiend-level activity and creating conditions for the mine area to become unsafe for the broader region.
the_ridgeline_site.what_can_be_done: Resealing requires finding Aldren's burial site, recovering his documentation of the original sealing method, and performing the resealing. This is not impossible. It is not simple. It is the kind of work the Pale Company exists to do — and why Soven is here.

soven_full_record.pale_company_role: Warden — Reader specialization (demonic site identification and assessment)
previous_operations: Two fiend-level clearances in the Grey Between
One Threshold Keeper collaboration in the Bound Marches
One incubus/succubus identification in a Solvanic Reach port community — used Halvard's method, took four months
soven_full_record.current_assessment_of_marches: The ridgeline site is the immediate operational concern. The succession instability is a secondary concern — political chaos creates the community trauma that demonic influence exploits. The disc discovery is significant. Soren sitting on it without knowing what it is creates risk.
soven_full_record.his_read_of_the_player: Has been watching. Has not yet decided. The decision point is approaching.
soven_full_record.the_first_conversation: Common room of the Marchwarden's Rest. A quiet evening. He sits down without asking. 'You've been here a while.' He waits. What the player says next — or doesn't say — is the assessment.
